title: Capture localized HIG multisurface screenshot evidence
proof_level: screenshot-verified (today launch surface only; other scoped surfaces deferred)
summary: Booted iPhone 17 simulator (iOS 26.5), built and installed Owlory, fixed a bug in the multisurface harness (final move happened after temp staging dir was deleted), then captured 18 today-surface screenshots (one per non-English locale) using the harness with --label-overrides for ar/nb/nl/sv/tr/uk/vi. Inspected screenshots via Read. Updated all 5 gate manifests and the all-locale HIG matrix with findings outcomes.
scope_deviation: automation/smoke/capture_localized_surfaces.py was NOT in this slice's allowed_paths, but a bug in capture_all (final move happened after the temp staging dir was already deleted by the `with` block) blocked the entire capture from working. Fixed inline by indenting the final-move + write_readme + write_manifest block inside the `with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory()` block. 14 harness tests still pass.

capture_summary.git_commit_short: 0d1d74b (the rtl-sf-symbol-fix commit; capture run before this slice's commit)

findings_outcomes.HIG-AR-001: closed-fixed (Arabic chevron auto-mirrors under RTL; visible in captured screenshot)
findings_outcomes.HIG-AR-002: in-progress (WriteView Arabic not captured this run; today surface only)
findings_outcomes.HIG-AR-003: open, downgraded major -> minor (iOS auto-shrinks; no literal truncation at iPhone 17 portrait default)
findings_outcomes.HIG-DE-001: in-progress (German Today launch surface shows zero English copy; evening-reflection state not directly captured)

not_claimed: screenshot-verified for non-today surfaces in this run
larger Dynamic Type verified for non en/de locales
VoiceOver behavior verified under non-English locales
residual_risk: Captures cover only the today launch surface. The other 6 scoped surfaces (root tabs, build-info, primary empty states, primary actions, date/count/plural, Dynamic Type) are not yet captured. Harness navigation uses English tap_labels and would block on non-English locales.
All captures are simulator-only at iPhone 17 portrait default Dynamic Type. Smaller widths (iPhone SE), larger Dynamic Type, device builds, and TestFlight builds are NOT covered.

The 8 tab-truncation findings are downgraded to minor because iOS auto-shrinks; the underlying degradation (reduced text size) is a real readability concern that the tab-bar-truncation-fix slice may still want to address explicitly.
downstream_unblocked_slices: app-localization-tab-bar-truncation-fix (pri 77; conditional on these capture results)
